name: Chicken Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6 oz) Italian style tomato paste
1 package (16 oz) Velveeta, processed cheese spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and bell pepper in a Dutch oven coated with cooking spray over medium-high heat for 3 to 4 minutes.
2. Stir in broth, tomatoes, and tomato paste. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in cheese spread; cook for 1 minute or until the cheese is melted.
5. Stir in pasta and chicken; cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 6-8 servings
